function[T0, T1: lib(add_comm_monoid).AddCommMonoid] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: List[T0], x2: T0 -> T1) { not forall(x3: T0) { x3 ∈ x0 = x3 ∈ x1 } or not x0.is_unique or not x1.is_unique or sum[T1](lib(list).map[T0, T1](x0, x2)) = sum[T1](lib(list).map[T0, T1](x1, x2)) } }

function[T0, T1: lib(add_comm_monoid).AddCommMonoid] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: List[T0], x2: T0 -> T1) { not x0.is_unique or not x1.is_unique or exists(k0: T0) { k0 ∈ x0 != k0 ∈ x1 } or sum[T1](lib(list).map[T0, T1](x0, x2)) = sum[T1](lib(list).map[T0, T1](x1, x2)) } }

function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: List[T0]) { (lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) and lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x3, x1, x2)) = lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x0 + x3, x1, x2) } }

function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: List[T0]) { not (lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) and lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x3, x1, x2)) or lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x0 + x3, x1, x2) } }

function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: List[T0], x2: T0, x3: T0) { not lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x0 + x1, x2, x3) or (lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x0, x2, x3) and lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x1, x2, x3)) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T2 -> T0, x3: T2 -> T0, x4: T2) { x0 != x1 or x2 != x3 or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x2, x4) = lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x1, x3, x4) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T2 -> T0, x3: T2 -> T0, x4: T2) { x0 != x1 or exists(k0: T2) { x2(k0) != x3(k0) } or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x2, x4) = lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x1, x3, x4) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T2 -> T0, x3: T2 -> T0, x4: T2) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x1(k0) } or exists(k1: T2) { x2(k1) != x3(k1) } or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x2, x4) = lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x1, x3, x4) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T2 -> T0, x3: T2 -> T0) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x1(k0) } or exists(k1: T2) { x2(k1) != x3(k1) } or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x2) = lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x1, x3) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T2 -> T0, x3: T2 -> T0) { x0 != x1 or exists(k0: T2) { x2(k0) != x3(k0) } or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x2) = lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x1, x3) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T0) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x1(k0) } or lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0, x3) = lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x1, x3) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T2) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x1(k0) } or lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0) = lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x1) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1 -> T2, x4: T0) { x0 != x1 or exists(k0: T1) { x2(k0) != x3(k0) } or lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0, x4) = lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x3, x1, x4) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1 -> T2, x4: T0) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x1(k0) } or exists(k1: T1) { x2(k1) != x3(k1) } or lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0, x4) = lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x3, x1, x4) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1 -> T2) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x1(k0) } or exists(k1: T1) { x2(k1) != x3(k1) } or lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0) = lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x3, x1) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1 -> T2) { x0 != x1 or exists(k0: T1) { x2(k0) != x3(k0) } or lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0) = lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x3, x1) } }

function[T0: lib(functions).Inhabited] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0 -> Bool) { x0 != x1 or lib(witness).choose_of_exists[T0](x0) = lib(witness).choose_of_exists[T0](x1) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: Nat -> lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { not forall(x1: Nat) { x0(x1.suc) ⊂ x0(x1) } or lib(set).is_increasing[T0](lib(set).seq_complement[T0](x0)) } }

function[T0: lib(functions).Inhabited, T1] { forall(x0: lib(finite_set).FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1) { not lib(functions).inverse_fn[T0, T1](x1, x2) ∈ x0 or not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x1) or x2 ∈ lib(finite_set).fs_image[T0, T1](x0, x1) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 = x1 or x0(x2) != x0(x1) } or lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 = x1 or x0(x2) != x0(x1) } = lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 = x1 or x0(x2) != x0(x1) } = true } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0 -> T1) { not (x0 != x1 and x2(x0) = x2(x1)) or not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x2) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0] -> lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { forall(x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { x0(x1) ⊂ x1 } = lib(set).is_set_reductive_map[T0](x0) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0] -> lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { not forall(x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { x0(x1) ⊂ x1 } or lib(set).is_set_reductive_map[T0](x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x2 <= x1 } = lib(order).is_upper_bound[T0](x0, x1) } }
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { not forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x2 <= x1 } or lib(order).is_upper_bound[T0](x0, x1) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T1, T1) -> T1, x3: (T0, T0) -> T0) { not lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x1 != x3 or lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x3, x2) } }
function[T0: lib(lattice).MeetSemilattice] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: List[T0]) { x0 <= lib(list).list_inf[T0](x1, x2) = lib(list).list_lower_bound[T0](List.cons[T0](x1, x2), x0) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0) { (lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) and lib(relation_transport).respects_binary_op[T0](x0, x1)) = lib(relation_transport).is_binary_congruence[T0](x0, x1) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0) { not (lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) and lib(relation_transport).respects_binary_op[T0](x0, x1)) or lib(relation_transport).is_binary_congruence[T0](x0, x1) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T0, x2: T0 -> T0) { not lib(relation_transport).is_unary_congruence[T0](x0, x1) or x1 != x2 or lib(relation_transport).is_unary_congruence[T0](x0, x2) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0 -> Bool) { not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x1) = lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x2) = (x1 = x2) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0 -> Bool) { lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x1) != lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x2) or not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or x1 = x2 } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0 -> Bool) { not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or x1 != x2 or lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x1) = lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x2) } }
